steps.title: Spot the location signal
steps.content: The phrase “on the bowl right next to the ceramic elephant” reveals that the narrator is positioning keys at a specific location. This action defines what “place” means in context.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
”Place” means to put or set something in a location. “Put” directly captures this action of positioning keys on the bowl, while rank (ordering by status), remove (opposite action), and unlock (opening a lock) describe different, unrelated actions.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
